---
title: "About"
---

This project is part of an internship at INSERM's Oncostat.
The Oncostat team ressources:

- [Website](https://oncostat.github.io/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/oncostat)
- [Gustave Roussy's website](https://www.gustaveroussy.fr/fr/oncostat)
- [CESP's website](https://cesp.inserm.fr/fr/equipe/oncostat)
- [Hal](https://inserm.hal.science/ONCOSTAT)

The website is build with Quarto. To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.


```{r}
#| column: screen
#| echo: false
longitude <- 2.3486887844529427
lattitude <- 48.79549511936336
library(leaflet)
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%  # Add default OpenStreetMap map tiles
  addMarkers(lng=longitude, lat=lattitude, popup="Where the Oncostat team makes magic")
```
